description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On Sunday, April 5, 2026 (Reiwa 8), we held the Hanno Fire Department enrollment ceremony at the Hanno-Hidaka Fire Station with many distinguished guests in attendance.

At the ceremony, 19 new members took their first steps as firefighters serving community disaster prevention: 13 who joined on April 1, plus 6 who joined partway through fiscal year 2025. All received their assignments.

Retiring Fire Chief Yasuhisa Otsuke, the 15th commander of the Hanno Fire Department, stepped down on March 31 after 31 years of dedicated service. Kazuhiro Kaneko was installed as the new Fire Chief. Both received their letters of appointment.

We extend our gratitude to all fire department members for responding to disasters day and night without rest. We ask that you continue to work hard to protect the safety and peace of mind of our residents.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202604/13428.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Hanno Fire Department Enrollment Ceremony, Fiscal Year 2026
